items.name: Urban LEO Standard Utility vest (Yellow font)
items.description:
Disclaimer: These items use 1024p textures, which have a chance to become minimized to 128p using R6. It's recommended you use R15 instead. If you're unsure about this purchase, test the item in a catalogue game first! Thanks!

Designed to be slim for easy maneuverability and comfort, the Tactical Enhancements standard utility vest is guaranteed to keep you safe and comfortable at all times while working a long shift. Favored by various law enforcement agencies for its' Kevlar material suitable against most lower caliber firearms or for small sharp objects, it's a must-have for those interested in living just a little bit more freely without being too restricted on movement.
